---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or a focused improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or developer problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Scope

- [ ] `runtime/`
- [ ] `docs/agents/`
- [ ] `docs/platform/`
- [ ] `products/tech_blog_monitor/`

## Why This Matters

Explain the practical value, not just the idea.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternatives or reasons to avoid broader scope.

## Validation Plan

How should this be tested or evaluated?
